titleStmt.title: SII 24.605: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 605. (A.R. No. 145 of 1938-39.) SLAB SET UP NEAR THE NĀḺIKĒṬṬĀṈ-GŌPURA

summary.p: Announces the order of the Hindu sabhā of Chennapaṭṭaṇam appointed as trustees by the Suprme Court giving publicity to the benefaction in the shape of an endowment of one lakh of varāhaṉ made by Pachchayappa Mudaliyār of Kāñchīpuram for feeding itinerant brāhmaṇas in the temple for 240 varāhaṉ annually out of the interest accrued on the endowed amount and utilise the excess interest over this amount for engaging a tutor on a salary of 5 varāhaṉ per month for teaching English to Hindu boys at Śrīraṅgam. The charity was to take effect form the year Śaka 1764 corresponding to 1842 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīraṅkam
kāñcipuram paccaiyappa mutaliyā
ruṭaya tarmam cakalarukkum piraci
ttamāka teriyum poruṭṭum ni
rantaramāṉa ñāpakattiṉ poruṭṭu
m ceyyum viḷamparamāvatu .
Iṟantupoṉa puṇṇiya puruṣarākiya
meṟpaṭi paccaiyappa mutaliyāravarkaḷāle vai
kkappaṭṭirukkum lakṣam varākaṉukku varappa
ṭṭa vaṭṭippaṇattil niṉṟum śrīraṅkat
til śrīraṅkanāta cuvāmi caṉṉitiyil tecāntari
pirāmaṇarkaḷukkut taḷikai viṉiyokatarma
māṉatu kaṉam poruntiya cūprimkorṭṭuk
kavarṉmeṇṭu Atikārikaḷāl tarmavicāraṇai
k karttarkaḷāka niyamikkappaṭṭuc ceṉṉapa
ṭṭaṇattil Irukkum Intu capaiyāravarkaḷu
ṭaiya Uttiraviṉpaṭi cālivākaṉa ca
kāptam 1000 7 100 6 10 4- m varuṣam kkuc cariyā
ṉa cupakirutu varuṣam mutal varuṣam 1- kku 2 100 4 10 va
rākaṉ celavuḷḷatāka naṭantu varu
kiṉṟatu meṟpaṭi mulataṉam cūprimko
rṭṭu Atikārikaḷuṭaiya Uttaraviṉ pa
ṭi ceṉṉapaṭṭaṇattilirukkum jeṉa
ral tirecariyeṉṉum kavarṉmeṇṭā
ruṭaiya pokkiṣattil vaikkappaṭṭi
rukkiṉṟatu . meṟpaṭi tarmam kiramamāka na
ṭavāviṭṭāl tarmattil cirattaiyu
ḷḷavarkaḷ meṟpaṭi capaiyāravarka
ḷukkut teriyappaṭutta veṇṭuvatu meṟpa
ṭi lakṣam varākaṉ poka maṟṟa mikutip
(pa)paṇattukku varappaṭṭa vaṭṭiyil A
ṉukūlamākum potu meṟpaṭi Iṭattil
Intupiḷḷaikaḷukku Iṅkilīṣ pāṣai
kaṟpikkaṟataṟku mātam 1- kku 5- varākaṉ campa
ḷattil Oru Upāttiyāyarai niyamit—
tu vittiyācālai yeṟpaṭuttappaṭum .
Digital edition of SII 24.605 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
